StateMachine.name: Demo1
StateMachine.description: Demo FSM that alternates between Foo and Bar states and forwards parameters into both child states.

Param.name: shared_prefix
Param.description: Prefix reused by both Foo and Bar when formatting and printing the counter string.

Param.name: foo_max_count
Param.description: Maximum number of times Foo should loop before finishing the state machine.

Param.name: step_delay_ms
Param.description: Delay in milliseconds forwarded to both demo states.

Key.name: foo_str
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.
